uk.kcl.laqn.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for London Air Quality Network CloudEvents on the `laqn-london` topic keyed by `{site_code}`.

uk.kcl.laqn.species.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for London Air Quality Network CloudEvents on the `laqn-london` topic keyed by `{species_code}`.

uk.kcl.laqn.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for laqn-london CloudEvents using the documented Unified Namespace topic hierarchy.

uk.kcl.laqn.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for laqn-london CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

uk.kcl.laqn.Site.name: Site
uk.kcl.laqn.Site.description: LAQN monitoring site reference data, including stable site identity, operator information, and WGS84 coordinates.

uk.kcl.laqn.Measurement.name: Measurement
uk.kcl.laqn.Measurement.description: LAQN hourly pollutant measurement for a site and species at a GMT timestamp.

uk.kcl.laqn.DailyIndex.name: DailyIndex
uk.kcl.laqn.DailyIndex.description: LAQN Daily Air Quality Index (DAQI) for a site and pollutant, published as the latest London-wide bulletin.

uk.kcl.laqn.description: Events from London Air Quality Network covering London air-quality monitoring sites. Reference records identify stations, sites, or areas; measurement and forecast records carry the current source data.

uk.kcl.laqn.Species.name: Species
uk.kcl.laqn.Species.description: LAQN pollutant reference data, including descriptive text and health guidance for a pollutant code.

uk.kcl.laqn.species.description: Events from London Air Quality Network covering London air-quality monitoring sites. Reference records identify stations, sites, or areas; measurement and forecast records carry the current source data.

uk.kcl.laqn.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of uk.kcl.laqn events with subscriber-friendly UNS topics.

uk.kcl.laqn.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of uk.kcl.laqn events for generic brokers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

borough.description: Routing attribute `borough` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

species_code.description: Routing attribute `species_code` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

borough.description: Routing attribute `borough` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

species_code.description: Routing attribute `species_code` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

borough.description: Routing attribute `borough` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

species_code.description: Routing attribute `species_code` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

uk.kcl.laqn.species.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of uk.kcl.laqn.species events with subscriber-friendly UNS topics.

uk.kcl.laqn.species.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 variant of uk.kcl.laqn.species events for generic brokers and Azure Service Bus.

subject.description: AMQP message subject matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

borough.description: Routing attribute `borough` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

site_code.description: Routing attribute `site_code` used in the MQTT topic hierarchy and AMQP subscription filters.

Site.name: Site
Site.description: LAQN monitoring site reference data, including stable site identity, operator information, and WGS84 coordinates.

site_code.description: Stable LAQN site code that identifies the monitoring site, such as BX1.

site_name.description: Human-readable LAQN site name published for the monitoring site.

site_type.description: Site classification published by LAQN, such as Suburban, Kerbside, Roadside, Urban Background, Industrial, Rural, or other.

local_authority_code.description: Stable local authority code associated with the site in the LAQN reference data.

local_authority_name.description: Human-readable local authority name associated with the site in the LAQN reference data.

latitude.description: WGS84 latitude of the monitoring site in decimal degrees. This bridge uses the decimal latitude field, not the projected WGS84 metre coordinate, or null when the upstream site record leaves the coordinate blank.

longitude.description: WGS84 longitude of the monitoring site in decimal degrees. This bridge uses the decimal longitude field, not the projected WGS84 metre coordinate, or null when the upstream site record leaves the coordinate blank.

date_opened.description: Date and time when the site opened, as published by LAQN in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format.

date_closed.description: Date and time when the site closed in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format, or null when the site is still active and no closure date is published.

data_owner.description: Organisation listed by LAQN as the owner of the site's data.

data_manager.description: Organisation listed by LAQN as the manager of the monitoring site data.

Species.name: Species
Species.description: LAQN pollutant reference data, including descriptive text and health guidance for a pollutant code.

species_code.description: Stable LAQN pollutant code, such as NO2, PM10, PM25, O3, SO2, or CO.

species_name.description: Human-readable pollutant name published by LAQN for the pollutant code.

description.description: LAQN explanatory description of the pollutant and how it is formed or encountered.

health_effect.description: LAQN health effect guidance describing the health impacts associated with exposure to the pollutant.

link.description: HTTP URL to the LAQN or LondonAir guidance page with more detailed information about the pollutant.

Measurement.name: Measurement
Measurement.description: LAQN hourly pollutant measurement for a site and species at a GMT timestamp.

site_code.description: Stable LAQN site code for the monitoring site that produced the measurement.

species_code.description: Stable LAQN pollutant code for the measured species.

measurement_date_gmt.description: Measurement timestamp in GMT, encoded by LAQN as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.

value.description: Measured pollutant concentration as a decimal number. The bridge omits records for timestamps where the upstream API reports an empty value.

DailyIndex.name: DailyIndex
DailyIndex.description: LAQN Daily Air Quality Index (DAQI) for a site and pollutant, published as the latest London-wide bulletin.

site_code.description: Stable LAQN site code for the monitoring site to which the daily index applies.

bulletin_date.description: Bulletin date and time published by LAQN for the daily index, encoded as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.

species_code.description: Stable LAQN pollutant code for the species to which the daily index applies.

air_quality_index.description: LAQN Daily Air Quality Index value from 1 to 10, where 1 to 3 is Low, 4 to 6 is Moderate, 7 to 9 is High, and 10 is Very High.

air_quality_band.description: Textual Daily Air Quality Index band published by LAQN: Low, Moderate, High, or Very High.

index_source.description: Origin of the daily index published by LAQN, typically Measurement or Forecast.

schema.description: Measurement payload for pollutant concentration measurements in the London Air Quality Network source.

description: London Air Quality Network publishes pollutant concentration measurements from the London Air Quality Network for London air-quality monitoring sites. These events help consumers build monitoring, alerting, analytics, and dashboards without polling the upstream API directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for London Air Quality Network, including upstream API context and bridge deployment notes.
